RevengersWrap.Name: Revenger's Wrap
RevengersWrap.Hint: Enable "Marked for Revenge" tracking and bonus effects for the wearer of a Revenger's Wrap.

BloodboundBand.Name: Bloodbound Band
BloodboundBand.Hint: Enable unpreventable damage shared between two or more wearers of a Bloodbound Band.

ColorCloaks.Name: Color Cloaks
ColorCloaks.Hint: Enable the Color Cloaks' trigger reminders. (Red = reduce fire damage to 0, Blue = shift equal to level, Yellow = bonus damage equal to level on next attack)

KuranzoiPrismscale.Name: Kuran'zoi Prismscale
KuranzoiPrismscale.Hint: Enable the Kuran'zoi Prismscale's trigger reminder.

HellchargerHelm.Name: Hellcharger Helm
HellchargerHelm.Hint: Enable the Hellcharger Helm's reminder when using Charge.

EnableElevation.Name: Enable Elevation Module
EnableElevation.Hint: Enable the elevation marking system for 3D combat
